info.purpose: Defines multi-tile objects (desks, computers, etc.) for LimeZu 16x16 base grid.
info.tileUnits: w/h are in base tiles (1 = 16px). Sheet tiles are 32x32 so 2 base tiles = 1 sheet tile.
notes: topLeftIndex = tile index in sheet (row-major, 32x32 per tile)
type: furniture = lower depth (1.5), decor = higher depth (2) so decor draws on top
render_offset: pixel offset for decor so it sits on furniture (e.g. computer on desk)
pivot: 'bottom' (default) = origin at bottom-center so tall objects (tents, gym racks) stand on the floor; use 'center' for symmetric objects
attachToSurface: for decor (fruit bowl, pillows) snap to nearest surface with surface_offset_y_px (e.g. -4); see ASSEMBLY.md and data/definitions.json
